gb-text-a91c716e">"Oi! I’m&nbsp;<a href="https://yummuse.com/wp-admin/edit.php?post_type=post&amp;author=2">Camila</a></div><p>Hi! I’m Camila Ferreira, a Brazilian-born, Halifax-based home chef who once burned a roast dinner so badly I nearly gave up but instead, I fell in love with cooking. My journey began in Recife, wound through São Paulo and Toronto kitchens, and now I help beginners feel confident behind the stove. My style is cozy, flavorful, and totally forgiving just like a good batch of cookies. Cooking isn’t about perfection; it’s about connection, creativity, and a little bit of courage. Let’s make something delicious together."</p><div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex"><div class="wp-block-button is-style-fill"><a class="wp-block-button__link
